name: @chart-review/mcp-core-adherence
description: Transport-neutral MCP handlers for adherence tasks (list_questions, read_question, set_question_answer, get_adherence_state). Parallel to mcp-core (phenotype) and mcp-core-ner. The agent commits one QuestionAnswer per question via set_question_answer; the platform later runs the deterministic rule engine over the collected answers to produce rule_verdicts. set_question_answer faithfulness-checks its note evidence via @chart-review/faithfulness, same gate the phenotype set_field_assessment uses. The OMOP verifier is intentionally deferred — answers store verifier_status:'no_check'.
